name: Jakarta Multicultural School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Pisangan Raya No. 99, Cirendeu, Ciputat Timur, Tangerang Selatan 15419, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Small multicultural school in South Jakarta. Inquiry-based, progressive approach. Intimate community, moderate fees.
paragraphs: Small multicultural school in South Jakarta. Inquiry-based, progressive approach. Intimate community, moderate fees.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$13K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: 2-hectare green campus, Swimming pool, Gymnasium, Science laboratories, Library.

metaDescription: Jakarta Multicultural School (Greater Jakarta). Small multicultural school in South Jakarta. Inquiry-based, progressive approach. Intimate community, moderate fees.…
